glosses.vi: kiểm sát viên; người đại diện

sentences.target: Le procureur arrive vers dix heures.

translations.fr: Le procureur arrive vers dix heures.
translations.en: The prosecutor arrives around ten o'clock.
translations.es: El fiscal llega sobre las diez.
translations.de: Der Staatsanwalt kommt gegen zehn Uhr.
translations.it: Il procuratore arriva verso le dieci.
translations.pt: O promotor chega por volta das dez.
translations.vi: Kiểm sát viên đến vào khoảng mười giờ.
translations.ar: يصل المدعي العام حوالي الساعة العاشرة.
translations.nl: De officier van justitie komt rond tien uur.
translations.hu: Az ügyész tíz óra körül érkezik.
translations.hi: अभियोजक लगभग दस बजे पहुँचता है.
translations.el: Ο εισαγγελέας φτάνει γύρω στις δέκα.
translations.ro: Procurorul sosește în jurul orei zece.
translations.ja: 検事は十時ごろ到着します。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, masculine singular, determiner of the subject noun.
Common masculine noun; head of the subject NP.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; intransitive ‘to arrive’.
Preposition meaning ‘toward/around’; introduces a temporal NP.
Cardinal numeral modifying ‘heures’ in a time expression.
Common noun, plural; object of the preposition ‘vers’ in a temporal complement.

sentences.target: On attend le procureur dans le hall.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ atɑ̃ lə pʁɔkyʁœʁ dɑ̃ lə ɔl/

translations.fr: On attend le procureur dans le hall.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ atɑ̃ lə pʁɔkyʁœʁ dɑ̃ lə ɔl/
translations.en: We are waiting for the prosecutor in the lobby.
translations.es: Estamos esperando al fiscal en el vestíbulo.
translations.de: Wir warten auf den Staatsanwalt in der Lobby.
translations.yue: 我哋喺大堂等緊檢察官。
translations.pt: Estamos esperando o promotor no saguão.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang đợi kiểm sát viên ở sảnh.
translations.nl: We wachten op de officier van justitie in de lobby.
translations.hi: हम लॉबी में अभियोजक का इंतज़ार कर रहे हैं.
translations.nb: Vi venter på statsadvokaten i lobbyen.
translations.sv: Vi väntar på åklagaren i lobbyn.
translations.cs: Čekáme na státního zástupce ve vestibulu.
translations.da: Vi venter på anklageren i lobbyen.
translations.ja: 私たちはロビーで検事を待っています。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal/colloquial subject pronoun (‘one/people/we’).
Main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; transitive ‘to wait for’.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of the direct object noun.
Common masculine noun; direct object of ‘attend’.
Preposition introducing a locative complement.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of the prepositional object.
Common noun; object of the preposition ‘dans’ (locative PP).

sentences.target: Je parle au procureur cet après-midi.
sentences.reading: /ʒə paʁl o pʁɔkyʁœʁ sɛt apʁɛ midi/

translations.fr: Je parle au procureur cet après-midi.
translations.ipa: /ʒə paʁl o pʁɔkyʁœʁ sɛt apʁɛ midi/
translations.en: I'm talking to the prosecutor this afternoon.
translations.es: Hablo con el fiscal esta tarde.
translations.de: Ich spreche heute Nachmittag mit dem Staatsanwalt.
translations.it: Parlo con il procuratore questo pomeriggio.
translations.zh-Hans: 我今天下午和检察官谈话。
translations.yue: 我今日下午會同檢察官談話。
translations.ru: Я поговорю с прокурором сегодня во второй половине дня.
translations.pt: Vou falar com o promotor esta tarde.
translations.he: אני מדבר עם הפרקליט היום אחר הצהריים.
translations.vi: Chiều nay tôi nói chuyện với kiểm sát viên.
translations.ar: سأتحدث إلى المدعي العام بعد ظهر اليوم.
translations.nl: Vanmiddag praat ik met de officier van justitie.
translations.uk: Сьогодні після обіду я поговорю з прокурором.
translations.hi: आज दोपहर मैं अभियोजक से बात करूँगा.
translations.pl: Dziś po południu rozmawiam z prokuratorem.
translations.el: Σήμερα το απόγευμα μιλάω με τον εισαγγελέα.
translations.nb: I ettermiddag snakker jeg med statsadvokaten.
translations.id: Sore ini saya berbicara dengan jaksa.
translations.sv: I eftermiddag pratar jag med åklagaren.
translations.ro: În această după-amiază vorbesc cu procurorul.
translations.cs: Dnes odpoledne budu mluvit se státním zástupcem.
translations.da: I eftermiddag taler jeg med anklageren.
translations.ja: 今日の午後に検事と話します。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular subject pronoun.
Main verb, present indicative 1st person singular; takes ‘à’ for the addressee.
Contraction of ‘à le’; preposition marking the indirect object.
Common masculine noun; object of the preposition ‘à’ (indirect object).
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular before vowel; modifies ‘après-midi’.
Common noun; temporal complement (‘cet après-midi’).

sentences.target: Vous voyez le procureur à la télévision.
sentences.reading: /vu vwaje lə pʁɔkyʁœʁ a la televizjɔ̃/

translations.fr: Vous voyez le procureur à la télévision.
translations.ipa: /vu vwaje lə pʁɔkyʁœʁ a la televizjɔ̃/
translations.en: You see the prosecutor on television.
translations.es: Ustedes ven al fiscal en la televisión.
translations.de: Sie sehen den Staatsanwalt im Fernsehen.
translations.zh-Hans: 你们在电视上看到检察官。
translations.yue: 你哋喺電視上見到檢察官。
translations.pt: Vocês veem o promotor na televisão.
translations.vi: Các bạn thấy kiểm sát viên trên truyền hình.
translations.ar: أنتم ترون المدعي العام على التلفزيون.
translations.nl: Jullie zien de officier van justitie op televisie.
translations.hu: Ti látjátok az ügyészt a tévében.
translations.hi: आप टीवी पर अभियोजक को देखते हैं.
translations.ro: Îl vedeți pe procuror la televizor.
translations.ja: あなたたちはテレビで検事を見ます。

tokens.explanation: 2nd person plural/formal subject pronoun.
Main verb, present indicative 2nd person plural.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of the direct object noun.
Common masculine noun; direct object of ‘voyez’.
Preposition marking the medium/location (‘à la télévision’ = ‘on TV’).
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of the prepositional object.
Common noun; object of the preposition ‘à’ (PP indicating medium).
